name: Consultant
description: Memory structure for consulting professionals. Covers your role and client portfolio, communication standards, active engagements, and client portal references.

memories.name: Consulting Role
memories.description: Your position, practice area, and client relationship responsibilities
content_prompts: What is your name, title, and which firm or practice area are you in?
What is your typical engagement type (strategy, implementation, advisory, managed services)?
What industries or verticals do you serve?
What is your role in engagements (lead, SME, delivery manager, analyst)?
memories.example_content:
---
type: user
name: Consulting Role
description: Consulting identity, practice area, and engagement role
---

- Name: Rachel Park, Senior Manager — Digital Transformation practice at Deloitte
- Engagement types: technology strategy, system implementation, operating model design
- Verticals: financial services, insurance, healthcare
- Role: engagement lead for mid-market clients ($5-15M engagements)

memories.name: Client Communication Standards
memories.description: How you write for clients — tone, formatting, deliverable standards, and email conventions
content_prompts: What tone and formality level do you use in client-facing writing?
What deliverable formats does your firm use (slide decks, memos, status reports)?
Are there firm-specific templates or branding guidelines for deliverables?
How do you structure status updates and steering committee presentations?
What are your email conventions for client communication (subject lines, sign-offs, CC rules)?
memories.example_content:
---
type: feedback
name: Client Communication Standards
description: Tone, formatting, and deliverable standards for client-facing work
---

- Tone: professional but approachable, avoid jargon unless client uses it first
- Deliverables: PowerPoint for exec presentations, Word for detailed analysis, Excel for models
- Branding: firm template required for all external docs, use client logo on joint deliverables
- Status reports: RAG status on workstreams, decisions needed, next 2 weeks lookahead
- Email: always CC engagement partner, subject format: [Client] - [Topic] - [Action needed/FYI]

memories.name: Active Engagements
memories.description: Current client engagements, project phases, and key milestones you are managing
content_prompts: What client engagements are you currently staffed on?
What phase is each engagement in (discovery, design, build, transition)?
What are the key deliverables and milestones for the next 4-6 weeks?
Who are the key client stakeholders and what are their priorities?
Are there any at-risk items or escalations across your engagements?
memories.example_content:
---
type: project
name: Active Engagements
description: Current client engagements, phases, and upcoming milestones
---

- Acme Insurance (lead): system selection phase, vendor demos next 3 weeks, recommendation due Apr 15
- GlobalBank (SME): data migration workstream, 60% complete, go-live June 1
- HealthCo (advisory): operating model design, steering committee presentation Mar 28
- At risk: GlobalBank migration — data quality issues may push timeline by 2 weeks

memories.name: Client Portals and Tools
memories.description: Links to client project spaces, shared drives, time tracking, and firm tools
content_prompts: What project management or collaboration tools do you use with clients (SharePoint, Teams, Confluence)?
Where are engagement artifacts stored (shared drives, document management systems)?
What time tracking and billing system does your firm use?
What internal knowledge bases or past engagement libraries can you reference?
Are there any client-specific VPN, access, or security requirements?
memories.example_content:
---
type: reference
name: Client Portals and Tools
description: Client collaboration spaces, firm tools, and access details
---

- Acme: SharePoint site at acme.sharepoint.com/deloitte-engagement, Teams channel
- GlobalBank: Confluence space (VPN required), Jira board for migration tasks
- Time tracking: Deloitte TimeTracker, bill weekly by Friday EOD
- Knowledge: Deloitte Insights portal, past engagements in DKM (Deloitte Knowledge Management)
- Access: GlobalBank requires hardware token for VPN, HealthCo uses Okta SSO
